# Silverline Retail

## Journal

Silverline Retail was a good logo win that came out of a retail tech meetup and a fast trial request from ecommerce leadership. The problem is not initial interest; the problem is that the original buyer moved on before stronger internal sponsorship was built.

That leaves the account in an awkward but salvageable place. People generally remember the pilot positively, but nobody is carrying the expansion story with much force.

#
